title: Twelve-Fold Structure
description: The recurring 12-fold division of the after-death journey across multiple traditions: the Amduat's 12 hours of night, the 12 gates with guardians, the 12 deity-days of the Tibetan Bardo, the 12 Kālīs of Tantraloka, the 12 zodiacal spheres of Steiner, the 12 cakra petals of Layayoga. The number 12 maps cosmic space onto the soul's journey.
